debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
⊢ range (HTPI.Exercises.val_image U A) = 𝒫 A

proof:
by
  apply Set.ext
  intro B
  apply Iff.intro
  · -- B ∈ range (val_image A) → B ∈ 𝒫 A
    intro h1
    obtain ⟨X, hX⟩ := h1
    rewrite [←hX]
    define
    intro y hy
    define at hy
    obtain ⟨x, _, hxval⟩ := hy
    rewrite [←hxval]
    exact x.property
  · -- B ∈ 𝒫 A → B ∈ range (val_image A)
    intro h1
    define at h1
    define
    set X : Set A := {x : A | x.val ∈ B}
    use X
    apply Set.ext
    intro y
    apply Iff.intro
    · intro hy
      define at hy
      obtain ⟨x, hxX, hxval⟩ := hy
      rewrite [←hxval]
      define at hxX
      exact hxX
    · intro hy
      define
      have hyA : y ∈ A := h1 hy
      use ⟨y, hyA⟩
      apply And.intro
      · define
        exact hy
      · rfl

  apply Set.ext
  intro B
  apply Iff.intro
  · -- B ∈ range (val_image A) → B ∈ 𝒫 A
    intro h1
    define at h1
    obtain ⟨X, hX⟩ := h1
    define
    intro x hx
    rw [← hX]

    define

    apply Set.ext
    intro x
    apply Iff.intro
    · intro hx

      obtain ⟨a, ha1, ha2⟩ := hx

      exact ha1
    · intro hx
      define
      have hxA : x ∈ A := h1 hx
      use ⟨x, hxA⟩
      exact ⟨hx, rfl⟩

by
  apply Set.ext
  fix B : Set U
  apply Iff.intro
  · -- B ∈ range (val_image A) → B ∈ 𝒫 A
    assume h1 : B ∈ range (val_image A)
    define at h1
    obtain ⟨X, hX⟩ := h1
    define
    rw [← hX]
    define [val_image]
    fix y : U
    assume hy : y ∈ {y : U | ∃ x ∈ X, x.val = y}
    define at hy
    obtain ⟨x, _, hxy⟩ := hy
    rw [← hxy]
    exact x.property
  · -- B ∈ 𝒫 A → B ∈ range (val_image A)
    assume h1 : B ∈ 𝒫 A
    define at h1
    define
    set X : Set A := {x : A | x.val ∈ B}
    use X
    apply Set.ext
    fix y : U
    apply Iff.intro
    · assume hy : y ∈ val_image A X
      define [val_image] at hy
      obtain ⟨x, hxX, hxy⟩ := hy
      define at hxX
      rw [← hxy]
      exact hxX
    · assume hy : y ∈ B
      define [val_image]
      have hyA : y ∈ A := h1 hy
      use ⟨y, hyA⟩
      apply And.intro
      · define
        exact hy
      · rfl

      rw [← hxval]
      exact hx
    · intro hy
      define
      have hyA : y ∈ A := h hy
      use ⟨y, hyA⟩
      constructor
      · define
        exact hy
      · rfl

    rw [← hX]
    define

    define at hy
    obtain ⟨x, _, hx_eq⟩ := hy

    · intro hy
      define
      have hyA : y ∈ A := h1 hy
      use ⟨y, hyA⟩

      · define
        exact hy
      · rfl

by
  apply Set.ext
  fix B : Set U
  apply Iff.intro
  · -- B ∈ range (val_image A) → B ∈ 𝒫 A
    assume h1 : B ∈ range (val_image A)
    define at h1
    obtain ⟨X, hX⟩ := h1
    define
    fix y : U
    assume hy : y ∈ B
    rw [← hX] at hy
    define at hy
    obtain ⟨x, _, hxval⟩ := hy
    rw [← hxval]
    exact x.property
  · -- B ∈ 𝒫 A → B ∈ range (val_image A)
    assume h1 : B ∈ 𝒫 A
    define at h1
    define
    set X : Set A := {x : A | x.val ∈ B}
    use X
    apply Set.ext
    fix y : U
    apply Iff.intro
    · assume hy : y ∈ val_image A X
      define at hy
      obtain ⟨x, hxX, hxval⟩ := hy
      define at hxX
      rw [← hxval]
      exact hxX
    · assume hy : y ∈ B
      define
      have hyA : y ∈ A := h1 hy
      use ⟨y, hyA⟩
      constructor
      · define
        exact hy
      · rfl
